title: [v3.0.1-rhel] fix CVE-2022-1227
body:
Vendor in the backports for psgo from the dedicated v1.5.2-rhel branch.

Signed-off-by: Valentin Rothberg <vrothberg@redhat.com>

comments.body: One old-old-old flake, two of the new quay.io flakes. All passed on rerun.
